title: All The Way Down

jokes.text: Shoot anyone who doesn't obey hard enough.
jokes.setup: Pre-mission pep talk expectation
jokes.punchline: Absurdly violent military instruction delivered casually
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mom character moment - casual evil delivered efficiently

jokes.text: Stop gaining knowledge, Hubert.
jokes.setup: Professor about to ask a question
jokes.punchline: Anti-intellectual command delivered authoritatively
jokes.explanation: Efficient character beat - Mom's disdain for intelligence perfectly compressed

jokes.text: It's not a duffel bag. It's my apartment!
jokes.setup: Reference to Zoidberg's duffel bag arriving
jokes.punchline: Reveals his living situation is so pathetic his home looks like luggage
jokes.explanation: Great character-specific reveal that's both visual and pathetic

jokes.text: You need an alien hacked to pieces, he's the best there is... in the budget category.
jokes.setup: Building up Zoidberg as the best surgeon
jokes.punchline: Qualifier that he's only good because he's cheap
jokes.explanation: Classic setup/punchline with good economy and character truth

jokes.text: There's nothing unethical about covert biological weapons research. I said relax!
jokes.setup: Professor asking if they're doing anything unethical
jokes.punchline: Casually admitting to war crimes while telling him to relax
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mom logic - admitting evil while being annoyed at concern

jokes.text: What?
jokes.setup: Professor saying they understand each other without words
jokes.punchline: Immediate proof they don't understand each other
jokes.explanation: Perfect comedic timing - one word completely deflates pretentious moment

jokes.text: So my efforts to establish diplomatic relations with the Cactus People were doomed from the start.
jokes.setup: Leela explaining most objects aren't aliens
jokes.punchline: Fry reveals he tried diplomacy with cacti
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry stupidity - takes scientific lesson and reveals even dumber behavior

jokes.text: So you're in pain and have a bunch of needles? I prescribe acupuncture. Let's begin.
jokes.setup: Fry covered in cactus needles seeking medical help
jokes.punchline: Doctor prescribes treatment that's exactly the problem
jokes.explanation: Classic Zoidberg incompetence - logical treatment that makes things worse

jokes.text: Blood?! I mean... blood. Put it back in me!
jokes.setup: Acupuncture treatment going wrong
jokes.punchline: Panic followed by failed attempt at nonchalance
jokes.explanation: Decent physical comedy escalation with character-appropriate panic

jokes.text: He's developed Simpson's Jaundice. Ay carumba.
jokes.setup: Diagnosing Fry's condition
jokes.punchline: Disease named after Simpsons with Bart's catchphrase
jokes.explanation: Meta-reference to creators' other show with perfect catchphrase integration

jokes.text: And I can't even find my own uterus.
jokes.setup: Warning that Zoidberg knows less anatomy than her
jokes.punchline: Reveals her own shocking anatomical ignorance
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about medical incompetence with good economy

jokes.text: You just had to stop cutting my spine when I yelled 'Stop, you're cutting my spine!'
jokes.setup: Zoidberg saying sawing accident was unavoidable
jokes.punchline: Reveals he ignored clear, specific instructions to stop
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation showing Zoidberg's incompetence through Leela's exasperation

jokes.text: My body rejected your liver, and now I've got Garfield Syndrome. Oh, I hate Mondays.
jokes.setup: Medical complications from botched surgery
jokes.punchline: Disease makes him quote Garfield's famous line
jokes.explanation: Clever naming convention for diseases with perfect catchphrase payoff

jokes.text: Wait. I say, 'Yes,' and you say, 'I couldn't limbo before.' You ruined the joke, Hermes.
jokes.setup: Classic 'will I be able to X after surgery' setup
jokes.punchline: Breaking fourth wall to complain about ruined punchline
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-comedy - character acknowledges joke structure within the show

jokes.text: My jaundice has progressed to Muppet Gangrene! It's not easy being gangrenous.
jokes.setup: Fry's medical condition worsening
jokes.punchline: Disease reference to Kermit with modified famous line
jokes.explanation: Strong wordplay combining medical condition with Muppet reference

jokes.text: Yeah, but did you ever play Jenga? Sometimes you pull one and...
jokes.setup: Explaining why he removed more vertebrae than planned
jokes.punchline: Comparing spine surgery to children's block game
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd analogy showing Zoidberg's complete medical incompetence

jokes.text: What started out as a pleasant afternoon of drugs and surgery has not gone as planned.
jokes.setup: Multiple patients maimed and diseased
jokes.punchline: Massive understatement treating carnage as mild inconvenience
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery of massive understatement - very Zoidberg

jokes.text: Might I suggest you jump out the door and poop yourselves?
jokes.setup: Military drop zone announcement
jokes.punchline: Casual suggestion to defecate from fear
jokes.explanation: Crude but efficient military humor - gets the job done

jokes.text: That's funny, like a crazy old man. But you know what's not funny? Deadly Tritonian hypermalaria.
jokes.setup: Laughing at someone saying 'wha--?'
jokes.punchline: Immediate pivot to deadly serious disease announcement
jokes.explanation: Good tonal whiplash from comedy to horror - classic Professor

jokes.text: Wow, he must've been a total Zoidberg. It was Zoidberg.
jokes.setup: Describing incompetent doctor as 'total Zoidberg'
jokes.punchline: Reveals it literally was Zoidberg
jokes.explanation: Perfect reveal joke - name as insult becomes literal truth

jokes.text: Not you, though. You'll make a complete recovery and go on to marry a supermodel!
jokes.setup: Announcing many will die from disease
jokes.punchline: Absurdly specific good fortune for one person
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection from doom to absurdly specific good news

jokes.text: What?! Supermodel!
jokes.setup: Doctor explaining disease symptoms
jokes.punchline: Soldier only focused on supermodel promise during death description
jokes.explanation: Nice callback showing character's misplaced priorities

jokes.text: Your mistake is being humans.
jokes.setup: Crew demanding Zoidberg be fired for malpractice
jokes.punchline: Blaming patients for being wrong species
jokes.explanation: Excellent Professor logic - technically correct but missing the point

jokes.text: No, if I'm going to fire anyone, it'll be Scruffy. You can't do that! Over my dead body!
jokes.setup: Expected to fire Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Threatens to fire competent janitor instead
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection showing Professor's backwards priorities

jokes.text: Thanks to Dr. Scissorhands, I wet myself every time I laugh. It's not funny! Well, I guess it is kind of funny. Uh-oh.
jokes.setup: Bender complaining about incontinence
jokes.punchline: Realizes his complaint is funny, triggering the problem
jokes.explanation: Perfect self-referential escalation - complaint becomes its own trigger

jokes.text: Long ago, Zoidberg and I entered into a secret arrangement relating to certain extraordinary events too horrible to reveal. So there's nothing to be curious about.
jokes.setup: Promising to explain why he keeps Zoidberg
jokes.punchline: Making it more mysterious while claiming there's nothing mysterious
jokes.explanation: Good Professor contradiction - revealing by claiming to hide

jokes.text: Never! Zoidberg doesn't abandon a friend, apparently.
jokes.setup: Professor ordering Zoidberg to leave him to die
jokes.punchline: Surprised at his own loyalty with 'apparently'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg moment - discovering his own character through word choice

jokes.text: Crunch all you want. I'll make more.
jokes.setup: Being eaten by yeti
jokes.punchline: Doritos slogan applied to being consumed
jokes.explanation: Clever commercial reference applied to dire situation with good economy

jokes.text: We don't know why the Professor keeps you around here, and we don't care. You're a terrible doctor! Nobody wants to see you ever again! Dr. Zoidberg! I want to see you right now!
jokes.setup: Crew banishing Zoidberg forever
jokes.punchline: Professor immediately calling for him
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and juxtaposition - immediate contradiction of banishment

jokes.text: I lost my virginity... during the film, so I'm... a little fuzzy on the details.
jokes.setup: Trying to remember Tarzan movie details
jokes.punchline: TMI revelation about sexual experience during movie
jokes.explanation: Classic oversharing moment with appropriate awkwardness

jokes.text: Is this one of those 'no means yes' deals? Yes and no.
jokes.setup: Professor changes his mind about wanting to be killed, Zoidberg asks for clarification
jokes.punchline: Professor's answer to yes/no question is literally 'yes and no'
jokes.explanation: Simple wordplay that works adequately. The literal interpretation of the question format gets a mild chuckle.

jokes.text: So you must murder me completely by surprise.
jokes.setup: Professor asking to be killed when disease hits
jokes.punchline: Specific requirement for surprise murder
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy escalation - making murder more complicated with specifications

jokes.text: Not surprising enough.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg presumably attempting surprise attack
jokes.punchline: Critique of murder attempt like it's a performance
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation - treating murder like a reviewed performance

jokes.text: I was only trying to kill the Professor.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg being arrested for attempted murder
jokes.punchline: His defense makes him sound worse
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zoidberg logic - innocent explanation sounds completely guilty

jokes.text: Great Little Caesar's ghost.
jokes.setup: Professor sees his bald reflection and realizes he's not dying of hypermalaria
jokes.punchline: He uses a pizza-themed variation of 'Great Caesar's Ghost'
jokes.explanation: Weak pun that just replaces one word in a common exclamation. Lacks creativity and doesn't add much to the scene.

jokes.text: Oh, no, he sand-crabbed out.
jokes.setup: Discovering Zoidberg escaped from cage
jokes.punchline: Using Zoidberg-specific verb for escaping
jokes.explanation: Clever character-specific terminology for Zoidberg's crab-like escape

jokes.text: Then I'll take it.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg saying he only owns a tanning salon coupon
jokes.punchline: Mom taking his pathetic only possession as payment
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mom moment - taking advantage of desperate poverty

jokes.text: Also, the salad's ready.
jokes.setup: Announcing kill-check completion
jokes.punchline: Casual food update during murder preparation
jokes.explanation: Good juxtaposition of domestic normalcy with murder preparation

jokes.text: He doesn't have hypermalaria, you idiots. He has yeti-ism.
jokes.setup: Everyone assuming Professor has the deadly disease
jokes.punchline: Reveal of different condition with medical-sounding name
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with medical terminology for monster transformation

jokes.text: Don't lecture me about alien physiology, Conrad.
jokes.setup: Professor questioning Zoidberg's medical logic
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg acting authoritative while calling Professor wrong name
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Zoidberg's false authority with name mistake

jokes.text: My God, he's like some kind of believable Hulk.
jokes.setup: Professor transforming into yeti
jokes.punchline: Comparing to Hulk but emphasizing believability
jokes.explanation: Decent pop culture reference with twist about believability

jokes.text: I'll be damned, it did make him a double-yeti.
jokes.setup: Zoidberg's treatment going wrong
jokes.punchline: Admitting his confident prediction was backwards
jokes.explanation: Classic Zoidberg - confident in completely wrong prediction

jokes.text: I was going to tan... once
jokes.setup: Everyone going tanning with coupon Zoidberg sacrificed
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg's wistful admission of lost opportunity
jokes.explanation: Sweet callback showing Zoidberg's sacrifice and simple dreams

tmdb_overview: The crew investigates whether the universe is a simulation.
